column1: # Columns are tab-separated. Do not use leading/trailing spaces around values.
#   method: brew | brew_cask | curl_script | npm | pyenv | nvm
#   extra:  url (required for curl_script) | global (pyenv) | default (nvm)
#   note:   brew_cask is macOS only — entries are skipped on Linux
#   line   → verbatim line appended as-is (key column unused)

column3: if command -v pyenv 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then eval "$(pyenv init -)"; fi
